findings.description: All 6 Task 9 TDD tests pass (tests 10-15). Tests cover: auth-widget presence on protected dashboard, absence on unprotected, nonce embedding (including 32-char hex validation), no webchat links, error overlays for no-access and service-unavailable. Manual verification steps also all pass.
Tests from previous tasks (1-9, tests for Task 7 and Task 8) continue to pass, confirming no regressions.

summary: All 34 tests pass (8 from Task 7, 12 from Task 8, 14 from Task 9). The Task 9 tests validate all key acceptance criteria: widget presence/absence based on ownerAddress, nonce format and embedding, no webchat UI links, error overlay injection. Build passes with zero TypeScript errors.
